description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push events to all branches except those matching **-1.3 or **-1.5, and tags except v1.*, and paths except docs/**, Changelog.md, and README.md. It also triggers on pull requests and published, created, or edited releases. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on both ubuntu-18.04 and macOS, checking out the code, caching dependencies, installing OS-specific dependencies, configuring, compiling, and running unit tests.
